name: closed-loop test promotes a synthetic test pattern through the full pr-corpus learning pipeline
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus active-rules && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/closed-loop-test.sh" --rules-out active-rules --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'step=promote synthetic_pattern=test-pattern' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
